name: skill-routing-kit
description: Local-first skill and plugin routing guard, registry, and diagnostics for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first skill routing guard and diagnostics.
interface.longDescription: Improve Codex skill and plugin hit rate with an always-on AGENTS routing guard, a local capability registry, and explicit diagnostic scripts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Skill Routing Kit to diagnose which Codex skill or plugin should handle a request, refresh the local capability registry, or improve skill routing hit rate.
